india_trends.title: 176% rally in 1 year: Gautam Exim announces stock split and bonus issue
india_trends.summary: Gautam Exim's shares are in focus after announcing a stock split and bonus issue. Despite a recent 2.6% decline, the company has seen significant long-term gains, with a 176% increase over the past year and 1,284% over five years, reflecting strong investor interest.

india_trends.title: Marico Q4 Results: Profit rises 14% to Rs 391 crore; co declares Rs 4 dividend
india_trends.summary: Marico reported strong March quarter results with 22% revenue growth and 14% profit rise, driven by robust India volumes and international momentum. Margins contracted due to high input costs. Board announced Rs 4 dividend, while full-year growth hit multi-year highs.

india_trends.title: Emerging Assets Drop as Middle East Flareup Weighs on Sentiment
india_trends.summary: The currency and stock benchmarks for developing economies declined as a flareup in the Middle East conflict reinforced concerns over a global inflation spike and curbed risk appetite.

india_trends.title: Top Gainers & Losers on May 5: Wockhardt, Tata Tech, Gabriel India, Dabur, Adani Green Energy among top gainers
india_trends.summary: Indian markets showed volatility on May 5 amid escalating US-Iran tensions. The Nifty 50 ended up 0.36%, while the Sensex declined 0.33%. Notable gainers included CreditAccess Grameen and Wockhardt, though profit-taking led to losses in several other stocks.
